_meta.note: Supplement: the fresh-verify REJECTED E37 (tyrion-joins-the-second-sons ENABLES siege-of-meereen) — the siege predates the joining, so ENABLES over-claimed. Replacement seam per the verifier's recommendation: tyrion-lannister PARTICIPATES_IN siege-of-meereen (Tier-2), Tyrion now a non-combat strategic asset in the besieging Second Sons. Wires the Tyrion-Essos arc terminus into the S144 Meereen container honestly.

edges.quote: The Second Sons are on the losing side.
edges.note: Replacement for the rejected E37 ENABLES. Tyrion, now enrolled in the Second Sons in the Yunkish siege lines, reckons the siege from inside as a strategic asset (non-combat involvement). Honest seam wiring the Tyrion-Essos arc into siege-of-meereen without claiming the join enabled the pre-existing siege.
